name: PCCOOLER CPS KN650 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 650W PSU, Native 12V-2x6 Connector, ATX 3.1 & PCIe 5.1 Ready, Dual CPU Power Cables, 105°C Rated Japanese Capacitors, P3-KN650-G1F and PCCOOLER CPS DS360 Display AIO CPU Liquid Cooler, 360mm Radiator, 315W TDP, ARGB LEDs & Customizable 2.4" IPS LCD Display, Ceramic Bearing, for Intel LGA 1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4, Black
shortName: PCCOOLER CPS KN650 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 650W PSU
description: Bundle combining a 650W 80 PLUS Gold fully modular power supply with a 360mm AIO liquid CPU cooler featuring customizable IPS LCD display and ARGB LEDs, designed for high-end PC builds.
